# Daily Reflection

> [!TIP]
> Use this at night when you want a light review without a full daily note. Keep each answer short enough to finish in one sitting.

---

## Today I learned

[What did today teach me? Include one fact, pattern, or realization.]

## I am grateful for

[What do I appreciate from today? Be specific.]

## One thing for tomorrow

- [ ] [The one action that would make tomorrow easier or better]

## Optional notes

[Anything else worth keeping]

---
